name: Wonko, Noble Knight of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ワンコ
name_jp_tl: Wanko, Holy Knight of the Forest
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" from your Deck to your hand, or, if "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" is in your field or GY, you can draw 1 card instead. You can only use this effect of "Wonko, Noble Knight of the Forest" once per turn. While a card is in a Field Zone, your opponent's monsters cannot target monsters for attacks, except this one. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can make the monster that destroyed it lose 500 ATK.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" from your Deck to your hand, or, if "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" is in your field or GY, you can draw 1 card instead. You can only use this effect of "Wonko, Noble Knight of the Forest" once per turn. While a card is in a Field Zone, your opponent's monsters cannot target monsters for attacks, except this one. When this card is destroyed by battle: You can make the monster that destroyed it lose 500 ATK.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" from your Deck to your hand, or, if "Fairy Tale Prologue: Journey's Dawn" is in your field or GY, you can draw 1 card instead. attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
misc: Requires card in a Field Zone
